offer: For law firms processing 5–15 client documents/month, missed deadlines cause client dissatisfaction. We provide compliance software instead of manual tracking and reminders.
problem: Missed deadlines for client documents and court filings.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to law firms with a demo video
Join community forums for law firms sharing tools
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking on 1-3 documents
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video illustrating the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
